The -ti ending marks the 3rd person singular — 'he dwells'.

judge.rationale: The MODEL includes some correct elements but misrepresents the root meaning and fails to capture the full range of senses provided in the GOLDEN analysis.

tips: The root 'bhikkh' relates to religious mendicancy
The -e ending is vocative plural — used when calling out to a group of monks.
The -ya ending makes this a gerund — 'having removed'.
Accusative ending — the object being removed.
